title: Subsequent elections
doc_html:
§161.  Subsequent elections

No election proposing to annex to the corporate limits of any city or town the same contiguous and adjacent lots or land shall be held oftener than once in twelve months.
doc_text:
§161.  Subsequent elections
No election proposing to annex to the corporate limits of any city or town the same contiguous and adjacent lots or land shall be held oftener than once in twelve months.
